sandbox.description:
Sandbox Mode simulates a real PS3 Syscon without a physical UART connection.
All UART commands are intercepted and answered using sandbox_data.json,
which contains a real 32 KB EEPROM dump from a Mullion CXR713 console.

You can edit sandbox_data.json manually to simulate different console states,
custom error logs, different firmware versions, temperature values, and more.
